[SQL: SELECT p.supplier_name, ROUND(SUM(fa.actual_amount), 2) AS total_refund_amount

context.user_query: 上个月物流破损退款最高的Top3供应商
context.sql_query:
SELECT p.supplier_name, ROUND(SUM(fa.actual_amount), 2) AS total_refund_amount
FROM fact_after_sales fas
JOIN fact_orders fo ON fas.order_id = fo.order_id
JOIN dim_products p ON fo.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE fas.damage_type = '物流破损'
  AND fas.handle_result = '退款'
  AND fo.pay_time >= date('now', 'start of month', '-1 month')
  AND fo.pay_time < date('now', 'start of month')
GROUP BY p.supplier_name
ORDER BY total_refund_amount DESC
LIMIT 3;
